title: Torrubia campestris
taxonomy: Torrubia campestris is a member of the plant family Polygonaceae, which includes buckwheat and smartweed. It is a genus of flowering plants native to East Asia. The species is often classified as a type of knotweed or smartweed. Further classification can be made within the subfamily Polygonoideae, where Torrubia campestris belongs to the tribe Polygoneae. The species can also be placed within the family Polygonaceae, which is a part of the order Polygonales.
